name: Christmas Jewels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Mix shortening, sugar, molasses, and egg in a large bowl until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, soda, salt, cinnamon, mace, nutmeg, ginger, and allspice.
4. Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the shortening mixture.
5. Stir in the mixed candied fruit.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the batter about 1 inch apart onto a lightly greased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
